propositions: Plan-review rounds show a ~50-67% per-round BLOCK rate with 87% of blocking findings newly appearing each round.
A single defect fans out to many blocking findings (up to 10 per round), inflating iteration count.
The convergence rising floor never engages because eligibility requires a prior CERTIFIED signature that BLOCK loops never mint, leaving most reviews ineligible.
Coaching notes and criteria-guide deep-links attach only to ADVISORY findings, not the blocking findings agents must remediate.
Plan authors are never routed to the plan-review-criteria-guide, so first drafts predictably fail the LLM tier.
The T5c security overlay produces a large advisory wall including out-of-scope findings; remediation must not weaken the gate (dedup groups, does not drop findings).
